Agent: Spawn a subagent to handle complex, multi-step tasks in parallel
AskUserQuestion: Prompt the user with a question and wait for their response
Bash: Execute shell commands (supports patterns like Bash(git *))
Edit: Make targeted string replacements in existing files
EnterPlanMode: Switch to plan mode for designing before implementing
EnterWorktree: Create an isolated git worktree for safe experimentation
ExitPlanMode: Leave plan mode and return to normal execution
ExitWorktree: Leave and clean up a git worktree
Glob: Find files by name patterns (e.g. **/*.ts, src/**/*.py)
Grep: Search file contents with regex (built on ripgrep)
ListMcpResourcesTool: List available resources from MCP servers
LSP: Query language server for diagnostics, definitions, references
Monitor: Stream stdout from a background process as notifications
NotebookEdit: Edit Jupyter notebook cells (add, edit, delete, move)
PushNotification: Send a desktop notification to the user (and phone via Remote Control)
Read: Read file contents, images, PDFs, and notebooks
ReadMcpResourceTool: Read a specific resource from an MCP server
RemoteTrigger: Call the claude.ai remote-trigger API to manage scheduled routines
ScheduleWakeup: Schedule a wake-up to resume work after a delay (/loop dynamic mode)
SendUserFile: Send generated files to the user as deliverables
ShareOnboardingGuide: Upload ONBOARDING.md and return a shareable team link
TaskCreate: Create a trackable task for progress monitoring
TaskGet: Get the current state of a task
TaskList: List all tasks and their statuses
TaskOutput: Get the output/result of a completed task
TaskUpdate: Update a task's status or progress
ToolSearch: Search for and load deferred tool schemas
Write: Create new files or fully overwrite existing ones
